bind-pdf-xmpmetadata.title: Bind PDF to PdfXmpMetadata and Retrieve XMP Metadata
bind-pdf-xmpmetadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file and binding it to a PdfXmpMetadata object to read the XMP metadata.

detect-xmp-metadata.title: Detect and Add XMP Metadata to PDF
detect-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to check if a PDF contains XMP metadata using PdfXmpMetadata and optionally add a custom XMP field.

set-baseurl-xmp.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to set the BaseURL property in a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

set-creator-tool-xmp.title: Set CreatorTool in PDF XMP Metadata
set-creator-tool-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to set the XMP CreatorTool property of a PDF to the current application version.

set-xmp-nickname.title: Set XMP Nickname Metadata in PDF
set-xmp-nickname.description: Demonstrates how to add or update the XMP Nickname property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-nickname-xmp.title: Remove Nickname from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to delete the Nickname element from a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-xmp-metadata.title: Retrieve XMP Metadata from PDF
retrieve-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to extract the raw XMP XML metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade.

read-xmp-schema-properties.title: Read Specific XMP Schema Properties from PDF
read-xmp-schema-properties.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve XMP metadata from a PDF, parse the XML, and extract specific schema property values such as creator and creation date.

modify-xmp-metadata.title: Modify XMP Metadata Property in PDF
modify-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read XMP metadata from a PDF, change a property, and write the updated metadata back to the PDF.

update-multiple-xmp-properties.title: Update Multiple XMP Metadata Properties in a PDF
update-multiple-xmp-properties.description: Demonstrates how to add several XMP metadata fields to a PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.

modify-xmp-metadata__v2.title: Modify XMP Metadata and Save PDF
modify-xmp-metadata__v2.description: Demonstrates how to edit XMP metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated document.

insert-page-update-xmp.title: Insert Page and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
insert-page-update-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new page into a PDF and update its XMP metadata before saving using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

split-pdf-preserve-xmp.title: Split PDF while Preserving XMP Metadata
split-pdf-preserve-xmp.description: Splits a multi‑page PDF into individual page PDFs and copies the original XMP metadata to each output file.

copy-xmp-metadata-merge-pdf.title: Copy XMP Metadata and Merge PDFs
copy-xmp-metadata-merge-pdf.description: Demonstrates extracting XMP metadata from a source PDF, applying it to a target PDF, and then merging the source pages into the target.

export-xmp-metadata.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save it as a separate .xmp side‑car file.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, replaces its XMP metadata block with the contents of an external .xmp file, and saves the result.

validate-xmp-metadata.title: Validate XMP Metadata Against Schema
validate-xmp-metadata.description: Extracts XMP metadata from a PDF and validates it against an XMP XML schema using .NET's XML schema validator.

log-xmp-overwrite-warning.title: Log Warning When Overwriting Existing XMP Metadata
log-xmp-overwrite-warning.description: Demonstrates checking existing XMP metadata and logging a warning if a property already has a non‑empty value before attempting to set it.

log-xmp-size.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
log-xmp-size.description: Demonstrates how to read the XMP metadata block size, modify it, and log the size before and after the change.

log-original-xmp-metadata.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF
log-original-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read and log the original XMP XML metadata from a PDF document before any changes are made.

add-creator-metadata.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF via Extension Method
add-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates a reusable extension method that sets the Creator metadata on any Aspose.Pdf Document.

clear-xmp-metadata.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF
clear-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to remove all XMP metadata from a PDF, leaving only the required schema header.

remove-xmp-metadata.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF, producing a metadata‑free file.

handle-encrypted-pdf-binding.title: Handle Encrypted PDF Binding Errors
handle-encrypted-pdf-binding.description: Demonstrates how to catch InvalidPasswordException when binding an encrypted PDF using a facade.

decrypt-update-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Update CreatorTool, and Re‑Encrypt PDF
decrypt-update-reencrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, decrypt it, modify the CreatorTool metadata, and re‑encrypt the document using AES‑256.

unicode-nickname-test.title: Test Unicode Nickname Storage in PDF
unicode-nickname-test.description: Creates a PDF, sets a Unicode nickname, saves and reloads to verify the nickname is preserved.

verify-basepath-escaping.title: Verify BasePath URL Escaping with Special Characters
verify-basepath-escaping.description: Creates a PDF, sets XfaParserOptions.BasePath with special characters, and checks that the URI is correctly escaped.

benchmark-xmp-metadata.title: Benchmark XMP Metadata Extraction from Large PDF
benchmark-xmp-metadata.description: Measures the time required to read XMP metadata from a PDF with many pages using Aspose.Pdf.

update-creator-tool.title: Update CreatorTool Property for PDFs in a Folder
update-creator-tool.description: Iterates over all PDF files in a specified folder and sets the Creator metadata property using Aspose.Pdf.

update-xmp-property.title: Update XMP Property in PDF
update-xmp-property.description: Command‑line tool that updates a specified XMP metadata property in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

bind-pdf-byte-array-xmpmetadata.title: Bind PDF from Byte Array to PdfXmpMetadata
bind-pdf-byte-array-xmpmetadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF loaded from a byte array to the PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract the XMP metadata.

update-xmp-baseurl.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF
update-xmp-baseurl.description: Demonstrates how to set the XMP BaseURL property of a PDF based on a host URL.

read-xmp-metadata-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF on UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-unc.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata with Aspose.Pdf.

list-xmp-namespaces.title: List XMP Namespaces in PDF
list-xmp-namespaces.description: Demonstrates how to extract and display all XMP namespace prefixes and their URIs from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-minimal-xmp-metadata.title: Generate Minimal XMP Metadata When Missing
generate-minimal-xmp-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, checks for existing XMP metadata, and adds a minimal set of metadata if none is present.

export-xmp-metadata-json.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata as JSON
export-xmp-metadata-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert it to JSON for integration with non‑XML systems.

compress-pdf-read-xmp.title: Compress PDF and Read XMP Metadata
compress-pdf-read-xmp.description: Demonstrates compressing a PDF with high compression settings and then reading its XMP metadata.

validate-xmp-metadata__v2.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
validate-xmp-metadata__v2.description: Loads a PDF, checks for required XMP metadata fields, and saves the document only if all mandatory fields are present.

add-timestamp-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to XMP Metadata in PDF
add-timestamp-xmp-metadata.description: Creates a PDF, adds a page with sample text, and inserts a timestamp into the XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xmp-metadata.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
extract-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read XMP metadata from a PDF file and convert it into a simple Dictionary<string,string> for easy consumption.

set-default-creator.title: Set Default Creator Metadata for PDF
set-default-creator.description: Demonstrates how to set a default Creator metadata value in a PDF when none is provided.

html-to-pdf-baseurl-switch.title: Generate PDF from HTML with optional BaseUrl injection
html-to-pdf-baseurl-switch.description: Demonstrates how to disable BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF by using HtmlLoadOptions without a base path, controlled by an environment variable.

refresh-creator-tool.title: Refresh CreatorTool Metadata for PDFs Nightly
refresh-creator-tool.description: A console app that scans a repository of PDF files, updates the Creator metadata field, and saves the changes, suitable for scheduling as a nightly job.
